lessons.text: Know your body as a field you observe.
lessons.rationale: Defines the body as the 'field' and the self as its knower.

lessons.text: See the same knower present in every field.
lessons.rationale: The one knower dwells in all fields alike.

lessons.text: Count desire, hatred, and pain as passing field, not self.
lessons.rationale: Lists the field's constituents and modifications, distinct from the knower.

lessons.text: Stay humble, upright, and free of pretense.
lessons.rationale: Mines humility, unpretentiousness, and uprightness from the knowledge list.

lessons.text: Injure no one; forgive, and hold yourself in check.
lessons.rationale: Mines non-injury, forgiveness, and self-control as a distinct virtue-cluster.

lessons.text: Serve your teacher; stay pure and steadfast.
lessons.rationale: Mines service to the teacher, purity, and steadfastness.

lessons.text: Loosen the ego's grip on sense pleasures.
lessons.rationale: Indifference to sense objects and absence of egoism.

lessons.text: Face clearly the pain in birth, sickness, and death.
lessons.rationale: Perceiving the evil in birth, death, old age, sickness, and pain.

lessons.text: Don't bind your identity to family or home.
lessons.rationale: Non-identification of the Self with son, wife, home, and the rest.

lessons.text: Stay even whether outcomes please or disappoint.
lessons.rationale: Constant even-mindedness toward the desirable and undesirable.

lessons.text: Withdraw into solitude to deepen your devotion.
lessons.rationale: Unswerving devotion, resorting to solitude, distaste for crowds.

lessons.text: Keep returning your attention to the Self.
lessons.rationale: Constancy in Self-knowledge is declared to be true knowledge.

lessons.text: Know the eternal that has no beginning or end.
lessons.rationale: The beginningless Supreme Brahman, beyond being and non-being, pervading all.

lessons.text: Support everything while clinging to nothing.
lessons.rationale: Unattached yet supporting all; the experiencer without attachment.

lessons.text: Find the one presence within and beyond all beings.
lessons.rationale: Subtle, near and far, undivided yet appearing divided in beings.

lessons.text: See the light of awareness seated in every heart.
lessons.rationale: The Light of all lights, beyond darkness, seated in the hearts of all.

lessons.text: Let nature own its actions and their effects.
lessons.rationale: Nature is the cause of action; modifications and qualities are born from it.

lessons.text: Notice how clinging to moods shapes your rebirth.
lessons.rationale: Attachment to nature's qualities causes birth in good and evil wombs.

lessons.text: Let the inner witness watch and permit, not meddle.
lessons.rationale: The Supreme Soul as observer, permitter, and sustainer within the body.

lessons.text: Grasp spirit and matter, and end your rebirth.
lessons.rationale: Knowing Spirit and Matter with their qualities, one is not reborn.

lessons.text: Reach the Self by meditation, knowledge, or action.
lessons.rationale: The three paths by which people behold the Self.

lessons.text: Even faithful hearing can carry you past death.
lessons.rationale: Those who worship on what they have heard also cross beyond death.

lessons.text: See every birth as field and knower joined.
lessons.rationale: All beings arise from the union of the field and its knower.

lessons.text: See the imperishable Lord within all that perishes.
lessons.rationale: He who sees the imperishable within the perishable sees truly.

lessons.text: Seeing one Self everywhere, you stop harming yourself.
lessons.rationale: Seeing the same Lord everywhere, one does not destroy the Self by the self.

lessons.text: See that nature acts while the Self stays still.
lessons.rationale: All actions are performed by Nature; the Self is without action.

lessons.text: See all beings resting in and rising from the One.
lessons.rationale: Seeing all beings resting in and emanating from the One, one becomes Brahman.

lessons.text: Rest as the Self that neither acts nor stains.
lessons.rationale: The Supreme Self, dwelling in the body, neither acts nor is tainted.

lessons.text: Stay unstained like space that touches everything.
lessons.rationale: Like all-pervading ether, the Self seated in the body is not tainted.

lessons.text: Let one awareness light up your whole field.
lessons.rationale: As one sun lights the world, the Self illumines the entire field.

lessons.text: Use knowledge's eye to part the field from its knower.
lessons.rationale: Perceiving the distinction between field and knower leads to the Supreme.

skipped.reason: Transitional setup ('hear from Me what the field is').
Narrative note that sages have sung of it in many ways.
Recap/promise summarizing the field and knowable already taught.
